label: Horizontal rule
summary: A wardrobe of horizontal rules for the semantic <hr>.
era: The divider-GIF drawer of 1998, braided ropes, chasing lights, rainbow bars, because every section break deserved jewelry.

classes.name: rs-hr
classes.role: base rule; the upgrade for a semantic <hr>

a11y: Keep the semantic <hr>, assistive tech announces it as a separator, whatever costume it wears.
